name: Matthew Currier
bio: I've been using computers since watching my dad solder together a Zenith H89 CP/M machine when I was 4. Since then I've worked on personal, commercial, and industrial systems from electronics to firmware, software, databases, and cloud services. I was an oilfield directional drilling service hand for nearly 10 years. I read & write music, books and code. Father of 5 — husband of 1. My true passion is to create and help others do what they were made to do.

projects.title: OsteoStrong Automation Systems
projects.description: Developed hardware and software for automating OsteoStrong skeletal therapy machines. Created distributed control systems, self-service kiosks, and manufacturing processes. 6 patent applications (2 issued, 4 pending).

projects.title: Spectrum
projects.description: An interactive, reactive osteogenic system that visualizes force production.

experience.title: CTO / Co-Founder
experience.responsibilities: Responsible for application programming and dev-ops, hardware/electronics design, and prototyping. Responsible for procurement, logistics, training, and technical support. 5 patent applications filed for automation technology (2 issued, 3 pending).

experience.title: Engineering Director
experience.responsibilities: Developing hardware and software for automating OsteoStrong skeletal therapy machines. Created database schema and systems for world-wide distributed controls. Developed self-service kiosk (full-stack hardware and software) for member performance assessments. Implemented manufacturing processes, QA/QC, logistics, and customer support systems. Leveraging AI/ML for data analysis, product features, and development workflow acceleration since 2023. 6 patent applications (2 issued, 4 pending).

experience.title: Controls/Software Engineer
experience.responsibilities: Developed advanced PLC automated control systems and standards. Created automation controller function libraries for command-request processing, task queuing, sequencing, limit/tolerance evaluation, and I/O processing. Created Hardware-in-Loop machine simulators (Siemens, Wago, PC). Designed SCADA software for coiled-tubing, drilling fluid pump, and nitrogen pumping units.

experience.title: Controls/Software Engineer
experience.responsibilities: Developed advanced PLC automated control systems and standards. Created PLC-based mux system for subsea distributed control systems. Worked on control system for robotic drilling rig machinery and automated drilling safety manifold for Managed Pressure Operations. Designed SCADA software for land and off-shore drilling rigs.

experience.title: Web Developer
experience.responsibilities: Designed and implemented database schemas, domain-specific data formats, user-interface templating, and feedback logging. Built charter school web application for tracking learning plans, grading, transcripts, and document management. Assisted in architecting a document control system for Sisters of Charity of Leavenworth hospital network. Various web applications including e-commerce, content management, and data visualization.

experience.title: Directional Drilling
experience.responsibilities: MWD electronics assembly, configuration, and drilling utility software. Planned and supervised Shell ERDD HLT project (22 wells from rectangular surface pattern to sub-surface ring). Managed Anadarko gas-well surface program in Uintah Basin. Member of Barrick Exploration mine-shaft freeze wall project. Led and organized drilling teams and packages.

experience.title: Rig Hand
experience.responsibilities: Directional natural gas wells in the Piceance Basin, western Colorado (Rig #909). Performed manual labor including rig floor equipment. Maintained drilling fluid properties and general rig mechanical, hydraulic, and pneumatic systems.

experience.title: IT and Programming
experience.responsibilities: Crafted Medical Manager scripts and performed client setup including requirements determination. Refactored government reporting templates for pediatrics clinics. Acquired and installed hardware and software solutions for office work and networking. Architected and built medical office computer record systems including PC/server systems and networking gear. Provided technical support for customers' hardware and software both over-the-phone and on-site.
